name: voxscribe
description: Transcribe audio/video to readable Russian text via faster-whisper on CPU. Three modes: (1) lecture — transcribe + stitch into paragraphs → .md; (2) dialogue — transcribe + pyannote speaker diarization + sbert punctuation restoration → dialogue with em-dashes; (3) folder — discover audio/video files and fan out to parallel subagents. Video inputs (.mp4/.mkv/etc.) are auto-extracted to wav via ffmpeg. Idempotent (skips already-transcribed files), atomic .partial→rename writes, output-sanity guard against silent/no-speech false-greens.
